creator: bp@barryp.org
text:
Created attachment 197780
Update port to RELEASE.2018-09-26T00-42-43Z

The current port version (RELEASE.2018-06-09T02-18-09Z) doesn't build with Go 1.11, failing with:

github.com/minio/mc/vendor/golang.org/x/crypto/blake2b.supportsAVX2: relocation target runtime.support_avx2 not defined
github.com/minio/mc/vendor/golang.org/x/crypto/blake2b.supportsAVX: relocation target runtime.support_avx not defined
*** Error code 2

This is tracked in https://github.com/minio/mc/issues/2524 and was fixed with a release back in September.
